title: Sonic Break
description: Warden's sonic boom now breaks blocks
body:
# Sonic Break
This mod makes wardens able to break blocks with their sonic boom attacks

### Example:
![warden doing a sonic boom attack that breaks blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7dc1360b4c57526adf182d3dbf93fa2b8b42d51.png)


# Configuration
Sonic Break provides 3 tags for changing what blocks do not get affected by sonic booms, depending on the distance from the warden: 
* `sonic_boom_immune_start` for 0–7 blocks
* `sonic_boom_immune_middle` for 7–12 blocks
* `sonic_boom_immune_end` for >12 blocks

(currently, these distance values are hard-coded)
